Supermarket Simulator Guide

Complete guides, tier lists, cheats, and strategies to master Supermarket Simulator. Build your retail empire with expert tips from the community.

Interactive Tools — Only Here

No other Supermarket Simulator site offers these. Try them now.

Profit Calculator

Pick any product, set your price, and instantly see profit, margin, and pricing advice. 26 products with wholesale costs built in.

Try it

Product Tier List

All 26 products ranked by profitability. Filter by tier, category, and margin. See which items deserve your shelf space.

Browse
